subject: WM-0129 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified owner post-M8 UI/playability blocker is recorded as a hard release-readiness blocker; M6/M7/M8, Web demo-only, Windows unsigned controlled-test, and owner-gated public release/store/signing/telemetry/accounts/paid-service/public-save boundaries are preserved; art consultation is advisory; WM-0130..WM-0142 cover required remediation lanes and remain unclaimed proposed tasks; code audit honestly records product-gate read-model and Noop/Echo command risks; required read-only checks passed.
